claims.summary: Delivery identity must be deterministic and independent of sensory entropy.
claims.disposition: Verify delivery IDs bind sender process, deployment, sequence, and canonical payload hash.

claims.summary: A receipt from the wrong server process or deployment must fail closed.
claims.disposition: Verify strict receiver process and deployment identity checks preserve pending state on mismatch.

claims.summary: Sequence and payload identity must remain distinguishable across a bounded deduplication window.
claims.disposition: Verify the 4,096-ID collision and duplicate-routing regressions.

claims.summary: Receipt-complete transport should preserve payload consistency across a sustained sample.
claims.disposition: Verify the twenty same-connection receipt fixture reports zero payload or routing mismatches.
